llm_result.summary: The case reveals a rapid, automatic pattern of social comparison triggered by others’ achievements, followed by a swift funneling into negative self-evaluation and rumination. Targeted levers should: (1) cultivate cognitive defusion and decentering to slow reactivity to triggers; (2) strengthen self-worth and compassionate self-relations to reduce jealousy and self-judgment; (3) restructure how triggers arise in daily life (media/social exposure) to lower incident frequency; (4) build positive affect resilience and social belonging to sustain adaptive responses; and (5) connect change efforts to personal values and concrete action. The proposed predictors are modifiable, cross BIO-PSYCHO-SOCIAL in nature, and align with the case’s stated motivation to change.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured mindfulness-based cognitive defusion training with brief daily practice (5-10 minutes) and in-session exercises; includes urge-surfing during social-comparison triggers.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Fosters decentering from triggering thoughts, reducing automatic comparisons, slowing negative self-evaluation, and dampening rumination; supports sustained positive affect by reducing reactive rebound.
solutions.measurement: Diary logs of trigger exposure (count per day), defusion success rating (0-10 after triggers), time to baseline mood after exposure, and frequency of automatic comparisons.
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns anticipated; monitor for any distress during mindful exposure; refer to clinician if mood worsens.
solutions.mapping_query: Maps to C01 (frequency of comparisons), C03 (speed of negative self-evaluation), C06 (rumination), C07 (sustained positive affect) by enhancing cognitive defusion and emotional regulation.

solutions.solution_candidate: Daily self-compassion practice (brief self-kindness breaks) and self-worth journaling; compassionate self-talk to reframe self-judgment after social triggers.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Directly enhances intrinsic self-worth, reduces aversive jealousy toward others, and improves ability to sustain positive affect after social comparisons.
solutions.measurement: Weekly self-compassion scale (short form), jealousy intensity ratings after triggers, and post-trigger positive affect retention scores.
solutions.safety_notes: Advise monitoring for excessive self-criticism; adjust kindness scripts if self-criticism intensifies.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C04 (self-worth), C05 (jealousy), and C07 (capacity to maintain positive affect) through self-compassion and self-affirmation work.

solutions.solution_candidate: CBT-based cognitive restructuring with thought records and Socratic questioning to challenge automatic negative beliefs after exposure to others’ successes.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: interrupts distortions driving frequent comparisons and associated rumination; reframe failures as relative to context and personal growth, reducing self-worth drops.
solutions.measurement: Number of negative automatic thoughts per exposure, distortion rating scale, and time-to-recovery after trigger.
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure exercises are conducted with supportive guidance; monitor distress during restructing.
solutions.mapping_query: Addresses C01 (frequency of comparisons), C04 (self-worth drop), and C06 (rumination) via cognitive restructuring.

solutions.solution_candidate: Digital hygiene plan to reduce exposure to peers’ achievements; strategies include unfollow/mute, scheduled social media checks, and a 1-2 week achievement-feed detox.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Lowers situational triggers that provoke comparisons, thereby decreasing immediate negative affect and subsequent rumination.
solutions.measurement: Daily minutes of social media use, number of trigger exposure events, and self-reported comparison episodes.
solutions.safety_notes: Balance with real-world social needs; ensure essential communications are not impaired.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C02 (triggers from others’ achievements) and C01 (frequency of comparisons) by reducing exposure to triggering content.

solutions.solution_candidate: Savoring practice and brief gratitude journaling after positive social news to strengthen maintenance of positive affect and resilience.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Enhances reinforcement of positive affect and prolongs its tone after social successes, reducing abrupt negative shifts.
solutions.measurement: Post-event positive affect rating, daily mood diaries, and savoring scale scores.
solutions.safety_notes: Encourage authenticity; avoid forced positivity; monitor for dissonance if not sincere.
solutions.mapping_query: Supports C07 by increasing duration/strength of initial positive affect after social positives.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured engagement in supportive groups or buddy system; practice celebrating others’ successes and mutual uplift to rebuild belonging and reduce envy.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Increased belonging and supportive feedback buffers against competitive comparisons and envy; enhances motivation to change through social accountability.
solutions.measurement: Network belonging scale, weekly number of meaningful interactions, jealousy ratings, and readiness-to-change checks.
solutions.safety_notes: Set healthy boundaries to prevent social overload; monitor for negative social dynamics.
solutions.mapping_query: Aims to reduce C01 frequency by fostering a supportive social environment, lessen C05 jealousy, and bolster C08 motivation through belonging.

solutions.solution_candidate: Values clarification session plus weekly action-planning and small experiments aligned with personal goals; regular check-ins to reinforce progress.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Links behavior to core values, enhancing commitment to change and reducing impulsive negative responses; builds behavioral resilience to triggers.
solutions.measurement: Action-plan completion rate, weekly values-congruent actions logged, and readiness-to-change ratings.
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor pace to prevent overwhelm; adapt plans to current capabilities.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C08 (motivation to change) and C03 (speed of negative evaluation) by grounding actions in values and structured plans.
